name: messaging
description: WhatsApp, Email, SMS — campaigns, templates, contacts, analytics

permissions.description: Read messaging dashboards, campaign reports, and delivery analytics.
Read messaging provider configuration.
Create and update messaging provider credentials.
Send provider test messages.
Read WhatsApp and email templates.
Create and update WhatsApp and email templates.
Submit WhatsApp templates for provider approval and sync review state.
Read contacts, segments, consent, unsubscribe, and suppression data.
Create, update, and delete contacts.
Import contacts in bulk.
Manage opt-in, opt-out, unsubscribe, and suppression state.
Read audience segments and resolved segment contacts.
Create, update, and delete audience segments.
Read campaign lists, status, and reporting.
Create and update campaigns.
Execute, pause, resume, and manage campaign runs.
Read message delivery logs.
Send individual messages and test sends.
Send bulk messages.
Read conversation inbox threads, notes, assignment, and SLA state.
Update conversation status, handoff state, tags, notes, priority, and SLA fields.
Assign conversations to agents or teams.

role_templates.name: Messaging Admin
role_templates.description: Manage messaging providers, templates, contacts, campaigns, sends, and analytics.

role_templates.name: Messaging Developer
role_templates.description: Configure providers, manage templates, send test messages, and read delivery logs.

role_templates.name: Campaign Manager
role_templates.description: Build audiences, manage consent, launch campaigns, and read campaign analytics.

role_templates.name: Support Agent
role_templates.description: Read contacts and message history, send replies, and review basic analytics.

role_templates.name: Messaging Read Only
role_templates.description: View messaging configuration, templates, contacts, campaigns, messages, and analytics.

wire_code.routes:
r.Route("/messaging", func(r chi.Router) {
	r.Use(identityModule.AuthMiddleware())
	r.Use(identityModule.TenantIsolation())
	messagingModule.RegisterRoutes(r)
})
r.Get("/messaging/webhook/whatsapp", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.Verify)
r.Post("/messaging/webhook/whatsapp", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.Handle)
r.Post("/messaging/webhook/email/sendgrid", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.HandleSendGrid)
r.Post("/messaging/webhook/email/mailgun", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.HandleMailgun)
r.Post("/messaging/webhook/email/postmark", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.HandlePostmark)
r.Post("/messaging/webhook/sms", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.HandleSMS)
r.Get("/messaging/unsubscribe/{token}", messagingModule.WebhookHandler.HandleUnsubscribeLink)
